The Learning Pass is a student-led nonprofit bringing books, mentorship, AI literacy, and opportunity to underserved children in Ladakh and other remote regions of India.

Student Mission
Our Story

Born from a belief that geography shouldn't decide destiny.

The Learning Pass was founded by a student who saw firsthand how geographically constrained regions create invisible barriers — not just to resources, but to the very idea of possibility.

What began as a mission to deliver books to schools in Ladakh has grown into a platform for structured academic support, AI literacy, digital empowerment, and sustained community partnerships.

We believe in student-led change — because the people closest to the problem are closest to the solution.

See Our Programs
What We Do

Programs & Initiatives

📚

Book Distribution

In partnership with the National Book Trust of India, we deliver 500+ books with ongoing quarterly contributions to partner schools — building libraries where none existed.

💻

AI & Digital Literacy

We conduct sessions on artificial intelligence and emerging technologies, bridging the knowledge gap and ensuring students in remote regions aren't left behind in the digital age.

🌐

Virtual Learning & MUNs

Coordinating virtual classes, mentorship programs, and Model United Nations conferences to connect Ladakhi students with peers and opportunities across the country.

On the Ground

Where the work happens.

The Learning Pass
By the Numbers

Impact so far — and growing.

500+

Books in students' hands

Delivered through collaboration with the National Book Trust of India, with ongoing quarterly contributions to ensure supply doesn't stop.

3+

Partner schools & institutions

Including a residential school for underprivileged children, with structured academic support and resource access programs in place.

∞

Sustained quarterly programs

Not one-time charity — we're building recurring, scalable systems that provide ongoing support across academic years.

2+

AI & digital literacy sessions

Introducing emerging technology concepts to students in remote Ladakh — preparing them for a rapidly changing world.

Who We Are

A student-led mission.

"I started The Learning Pass because I believe the right book, the right mentor, the right opportunity — placed in the right hands — can change the direction of an entire life." — Vivan Balhara, Founder

VB

Vivan Balhara

Founder · Grade 12 Student

Grade 12 student and founder of The Learning Pass, leading partnerships with schools, the National Book Trust of India, and institutions across Ladakh to deliver structured, scalable learning programs.

Join Us

Be part of the journey.

Whether you want to volunteer your time, donate books, sponsor a program, or partner as an institution — there's a path for you here.

We're looking for mentors, educators, donors, and organizations who believe that where you're born shouldn't limit how far you can go.
